implementationSummary: Added backfill_revenue_partition for one-day revenue bucket: skip when complete, A-36 shop performance + A-37 per-hour customers (overall preferred, hourly sum fallback), transform/upsert to analytics_performance_intervals, mark_complete only after upsert, budget attempt/success/failure accounting. Six fixture-based unit tests; no live Partner calls; GMV labeling via existing transform path.

A-37 hourly customers sum fallback is exercised in production when overall absent; primary path covered by fixture test
